confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of knot sequence and completion. Suture placement appears accurate to marks though exact mm measurements difficult due to camera angle. No obvious penalties observed.
cannot_determine: Precise mm deviation measurements at entry/exit points due to camera angle and lighting
Exact location of target marks on practice pad
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient execution and proper technique throughout. Completion time of 84 seconds places this in expert range (80-120s).
strengths: Excellent completion time at expert level
Proper hand switching between all throws
Clean suture placement with no visible gaps
improvement_suggestions: Performance already at expert level with minimal areas for improvement
